.. change::
    :tags: feature, postgresql
    :tickets: 1730

    Added a new ``EnvironmentContext.configure()`` option,
    ``postgresql_add_enum_value_if_not_exists``, which can also be set from
    ``alembic.ini`` / ``[tool.alembic]``.  When enabled, PostgreSQL
    ``ALTER TYPE ... ADD VALUE`` statements rendered by autogenerate as
    ``op.execute(...)`` are emitted as
    ``ALTER TYPE ... ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS``.
